creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 213759
sentry-cli-1.52.3.diff

Amended:
 * Bumped DISTVERSION to 1.52.3 and updated distinfo.
 * Addressed stage-qa warning message [1].

[1] 'Warning: you may not need USES=ssl', append ':build' to the
    ssl uses. OpenSSL is not a declared shared library dependency,
    and as such not needed for other than building.

Changelog:
 * https://github.com/getsentry/sentry-cli/releases/tag/1.52.3

Tested:
 * portlint: OK (looks fine).
 * testport: OK (poudriere: 3.3.4).
